title: Retail Sale via Internet Activity Requirements
summary: Requires online sellers to register an e-store or e-marketplace address, provide return and refund policy, terms of use, user data protection policy, secure online payment, active shopping cart and goods delivery before commencing operations.

theme_notes.digital_economy.ecommerce: Requirements for businesses conducting retail sales online.
theme_notes.digital_economy.online_platforms: Requirements for online selling platforms and e-stores.
theme_notes.online_content.online_advertising_influe: Commercial requirements for online sellers and e-store operators.

notes: Related instruments: Related to ISIC Code 4791 Retail Sale via Internet and eCommerce National Strategy
